04.title: Perfection

seo.title: Event & Wedding Catering — Kahramana Baghdad | Bahrain
seo.description: Full Iraqi catering service for weddings and events in Bahrain, delivered with the authentic Kahramana Baghdad flavour.

hero.title: Iraqi hospitality made for your occasions
hero.description: From family gatherings to business meetings, Kahramana Baghdad prepares special orders with care, structure, and a level of hospitality worthy of the occasion.
hero.microcopy: Details and pricing are confirmed after the Kahramana team reviews your request.
hero.visualAlt: Luxury Iraqi hospitality by Kahramana Baghdad for private occasions

familyFeasts.title: Family Feasts
familyFeasts.description: Large family orders prepared for gatherings, guests, and shared tables.

businessMeetings.title: Business Meetings
businessMeetings.description: Options suited for corporate meetings and professional hospitality, based on guest count and timing.

majlis.title: Majlis Gatherings
majlis.description: Authentic Iraqi dishes prepared for majlis gatherings and special invitations.

privateOccasions.title: Private Occasions
privateOccasions.description: Flexible options for private occasions, coordinated after reviewing the request details.

protocol.title: Kahramana Hospitality Protocol
protocol.description: Every private order starts with clear details, then team review before confirming dishes, timing, and pickup or delivery method.

request.title: Request
request.description: The client shares the occasion details: date, guest count, area, and preferred service type.

review.title: Review
review.description: The Kahramana team reviews the request and suggests suitable selections based on guest count and occasion type.

confirmation.title: Confirmation
confirmation.description: Once the items and timing are agreed, the order and pickup or delivery method are confirmed.

preparation.title: Preparation
preparation.description: The order is prepared with care, with quality and packaging reviewed before leaving the kitchen.

styles.title: Catering Request Styles

familyOrder.title: Family Order
familyOrder.description: Ideal for home and family gatherings, with main dishes and appetizers selected based on guest count.

corporateHospitality.title: Corporate Hospitality
corporateHospitality.description: Organized selections for business meetings and professional hospitality, based on timing and attendees.

iraqiFeast.title: Iraqi Feast
iraqiFeast.description: A fuller Iraqi dining experience for larger occasions, coordinated after reviewing the details.

styles.note: No fixed prices are shown here; pricing depends on selected dishes, quantity, timing, and area.

signature.title: Dishes Made for Sharing
signature.description: Examples from the menu that suit sharing, shown without prices. Availability and suitable quantities are reviewed after contact.
signature.note: Displaying these dishes does not mean they are available for every occasion; final selections are confirmed based on availability and order size.

form.title: Tell Us About Your Occasion
form.description: Share the essential details and we will open a structured WhatsApp message so the Kahramana team can review your request and prepare a suitable quote.
form.notice: Submission is through WhatsApp only in this phase. No online payment is collected through this form.

notes.label: Requested dishes or notes
notes.placeholder: Write preferred dishes, hospitality style, or important notes

pricing.question: Are there fixed prices for catering?
pricing.answer: Fixed prices are not shown here. Pricing is determined after reviewing selected dishes, quantity, timing, and area.

notice.question: When should I send the request?
notice.answer: It is best to send the details as early as possible so the team can review availability and suggest suitable selections.

delivery.question: Can delivery be arranged to the occasion location?
delivery.answer: Delivery may be available depending on occasion size, area, and team confirmation. Pickup from the branch can also be arranged.

customization.question: Can the team suggest dishes based on the occasion?
customization.answer: Yes. The team can suggest suitable selections after reviewing guest count, timing, and the preferred hospitality style.

finalCta.title: Let us arrange hospitality worthy of your occasion
finalCta.description: Send the essential details and the Kahramana team will review availability and suitable selections before confirming.

seo.title: Kahramana Baghdad Branches — Riffa, Qallali & Al-Budayi | Bahrain
seo.description: Kahramana Baghdad branches in Bahrain: Riffa, Qallali, and Al-Budayi (coming soon). Maps, contact numbers, and opening hours.

hero.title: Mesopotamian Roots, Reimagined
hero.description: We await you at Bahrain's most prestigious locations to offer you the exceptional Kahramana experience, blending the authenticity of the past with the luxury of the present.

authentic.title: Authentic Taste
authentic.description: We adhere to authentic Baghdadi ancestral recipes to ensure an unforgettable flavor in every dish.

quality.title: Ingredient Quality
quality.description: We select the finest fresh meats and vegetables daily to ensure the highest quality standards.

speed.title: Service Speed
speed.description: We value your time, so we ensure orders are served quickly and efficiently without compromising on taste.

hospitality.title: Warm Hospitality
hospitality.description: We welcome you with Iraqi generosity that reflects the warmth of the people of Mesopotamia in all our branches.

hours.a: We are open daily from 12:00 PM to 12:00 AM. Hours may vary on public holidays.

delivery.a: Yes, we offer delivery via WhatsApp order. Contact your nearest branch to confirm delivery area and timing.

party.a: Yes, we welcome group bookings and private gatherings. Please contact your nearest branch in advance.

quality.q: How do you ensure food quality?
quality.a: We use fresh, daily-sourced ingredients and follow authentic Baghdadi recipes passed down through generations.

seo.homeTitle: Kahramana Baghdad — Ambassador of Baghdad Flavour in Bahrain | Riffa & Qallali
seo.homeDescription: Kahramana Baghdad: ambassador of Baghdad flavour in Bahrain. Charcoal grills, masgouf, quzi, and dolma. Riffa and Qallali branches with delivery; Al-Budayi branch coming soon.

seo.aboutTitle: Our Story — Kahramana Baghdad | Iraqi Restaurant Bahrain
seo.aboutDescription: The story of Kahramana Baghdad and founder Eng. Asaad Al-Jubouri — bringing authentic Iraqi cuisine to Bahrain.

telemetry.title: Real-Time Kitchen
telemetry.desc: Every order tracked from placement to delivery.

philosophy.standard: Where every dish tells a story of Baghdad's rich culinary heritage.

01.title: Source
01.desc: We carefully select the finest fresh ingredients daily from trusted local suppliers.

02.title: Prepare
02.desc: Our chefs follow authentic Baghdadi recipes, preparing each dish with precision and care.

03.title: Cook
03.desc: Traditional cooking methods bring out the true flavors of every ingredient.

04.title: Serve
04.desc: Each dish is presented with pride, delivering a complete dining experience.

hero.title: From Baghdad to Bahrain
hero.desc: A journey of flavors, heritage, and the passion to bring authentic Iraqi cuisine to the world.

founder.title: A Vision Born in Baghdad
founder.quote: Every dish we serve carries the soul of Baghdad — its history, its warmth, and its love for good food.
founder.vision: We didn't just open a restaurant. We built a bridge between two cultures, connected by the universal language of food.

narrative.title: Roots That Run Deep
narrative.p1: Kahramana Baghdad was born from a deep love for Iraqi culinary heritage — the smoky masgouf grilled by the Tigris, the slow-roasted quzi served at family celebrations, and the humble timan that anchors every Iraqi meal.
narrative.p2: When we opened our doors in Bahrain, our mission was clear: to offer an authentic taste of Baghdad without compromise. No shortcuts. No substitutions. Just the real thing.
narrative.p3: Today, with two branches and a growing family of loyal guests, we continue that promise every single day.

m1.title: The Beginning
m1.desc: Kahramana Baghdad opens its first branch in Riffa, introducing authentic Iraqi cuisine to Bahrain.

m2.title: Growing Family
m2.desc: Our second branch opens in Muharraq, bringing the flavors of Baghdad closer to more communities.

m3.title: Digital Evolution
m3.desc: Launching our digital platform to make ordering easier while preserving the authentic Kahramana experience.

philosophy.title: More Than a Meal
philosophy.desc: We believe food is memory, culture, and connection. Every dish we serve is a piece of Baghdad's soul, prepared with the same care as if you were a guest in our home.

step1.title: Authenticity
step1.desc: We never compromise on recipes. Every dish follows the original Baghdadi method, no substitutions.

step2.title: Freshness
step2.desc: Ingredients are sourced daily. If it's not fresh, it's not served.

step3.title: Craft
step3.desc: Our chefs train for years to master the techniques that make Iraqi cuisine unique.

step4.title: Hospitality
step4.desc: Every guest is welcomed as family — with warmth, respect, and genuine care.

v1.title: Authenticity
v1.desc: True to Baghdad's culinary heritage in every dish.

v2.title: Quality
v2.desc: Uncompromising standards from ingredient to plate.

v3.title: Innovation
v3.desc: Honoring tradition while embracing modern hospitality.

v4.title: Heart
v4.desc: Cooking with passion, serving with love.

v5.title: Community
v5.desc: Building connections one shared meal at a time.

v6.title: Legacy
v6.desc: Preserving Iraqi culinary heritage for generations to come.

branches.title: Find Us
branches.desc: Two branches in Bahrain, one authentic experience.

cta.title: Ready to Experience Baghdad?
cta.desc: Visit us at either of our branches or order online via WhatsApp.
